name: Frosted Christmas Brownies
recipeInstructions:
Buttercream Frosting:
1. In a large bowl, soften 3 tablespoons margarine or butter.
2. Sift in 2 cups powdered sugar.
3. Gradually add 3 tablespoons more or less milk and 1/2 teaspoon vanilla extract.
4. Beat until desired consistency.
Cake:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C).
2. Line a 12-inch pizza pan with aluminum foil.
3. In a medium bowl, stir together melted margarine, sugar, and vanilla.
4. Add eggs; beat well with a spoon.
5. Gradually combine flour, cocoa powder, baking powder, and salt with the egg mixture, stirring until well blended.
6. Spread batter evenly in the prepared pan.
7. Bake for 20 to 22 minutes or until the top springs back when lightly touched in the center.
8. Cool on a wire rack.
1. Trim any edges that may have gone over the side of the pan.
2. If desired, remove brownie from the pan and peel off foil (or serve in the pan).
3. Spread frosting evenly over the top.
4. Draw holly leaves on the frosted brownie and place red candies in their proper places to resemble holly berries.
